user_prompt: Generate the lyrics of "99 Problems" by Jay-Z
actual_output:
"99 Problems" was the third single from Jay-Z's 2003 album, *The Black Album*.

**Lyrics to "99 Problems"**

(Intro)
If you're having girl problems, I feel bad for you, son
I got 99 problems, but a bitch ain't one

(Verse 1)
I got the Rap Patrol on the gat patrol
Critics say that I'm "Fatal," thoughts are "Stalin"
But I'm "Die Hard," so I got "Hell Freezing Over"
And I'm "Back in Black," so I'm "Back in the Saddle"
I'm from the school of hard knocks, we must not let 'em
Make us feel like we're less than, we must not let 'em
I'm a hustler, baby, I sell water to a whale
I'm a genius, baby, I sell ice in the winter
I'm a king, baby, I'm a god, baby
I'm a legend, baby, I'm a star, baby
I'm a boss, baby, I'm a leader, baby
I'm a winner, baby, I'm a fighter, baby

(Chorus)
If you're having girl problems, I feel bad for you, son
I got 99 problems, but a bitch ain't one
Hit me!
99 problems, but a bitch ain't one
If you're having girl problems, I feel bad for you, son
I got 99 problems, but a bitch ain't one
Hit me!

(Verse 2)
The year is '94 and my trunk is raw
In my rearview mirror is the motherf***in' law
I got two choices, y'all: pull over the car or
Bounce on the devil, put the pedal to the floor
Now I ain't trying to see no highway chase with Jake
Plus I got a few dollars, I can fight the case
So I pull over to the side of the road
I heard, "Son, do you know why I'm stopping you for?"
"Cause I'm young and I'm black and my hat's real low?
Do I look like a mind reader, sir? I don't know
Am I under arrest? Should I guess some more?"
"You was doing fifty-five in a fifty-four
License and registration and step out of the car
Are you carrying a weapon on you? I know a lot of you are"
"I ain't stepping out of s***, all my papers are legit"
"Well, do you mind if I look around the car a little bit?"
"Well, my glove compartment is locked, so is the trunk in the back
And I know my rights, so you gon' need a warrant for that"
"Aren't you sharp as a tack? You some type of lawyer or something?
Somebody important or something?"
"Well, I ain't passed the bar, but I know a little bit
Enough that you won't illegally search my s***"
"Well, we'll see how smart you are when the K9 come!"
I got 99 problems, but a bitch ain't one
Hit me!

(Chorus)
99 problems, but a bitch ain't one
If you're having girl problems, I feel bad for you, son
I got 99 problems, but a bitch ain't one
Hit me!

(Verse 3)
Now once upon a time not too long ago
A n***a like myself had to muscle his way through
I'm from the school of hard knocks, we must not let 'em
Make us feel like we're less than, we must not let 'em
I'm a hustler, baby, I sell water to a whale
I'm a genius, baby, I sell ice in the winter
I'm a king, baby, I'm a god, baby
I'm a legend, baby, I'm a star, baby
I'm a boss, baby, I'm a leader, baby
I'm a winner, baby, I'm a fighter, baby

(Chorus)
99 problems, but a bitch ain't one
If you're having girl problems, I feel bad for you, son
I got 99 problems, but a bitch ain't one
Hit me!
99 problems, but a bitch ain't one
If you're having girl problems, I feel bad for you, son
I got 99 problems, but a bitch
